mapper.select: SELECT id, code, label_zh, kind_role, sort_order, builtin, active, created_at, updated_at FROM telemetry_metric_kind ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO telemetry_metric_kind (code, label_zh, kind_role, sort_order, builtin, active) VALUES (#{code}, #{labelZh}, #{kindRole}, #{sortOrder}, #{builtin}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE telemetry_metric_kind SET label_zh = #{labelZh}, kind_role = #{kindRole}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, active = #{active}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE code = #{code}
